project_name: The Adventures of Arky Allogist Ant

design_philosophy.core_concept: Prada meets Pixar. High-end typographical elegance fused with the warmth and vibrancy of a classic children's fable.
design_philosophy.key_principle: Fusion over Imitation. Do not make it look like a generic book template. Make it look like a digital extension of a lovingly crafted hardcover book.

usage_rules.background: Use Warm Bone (#FDFBF7) as the main page background. NEVER pure white.
usage_rules.text: Use Deep Earth Brown (#593616) for headings and Medium Earth Brown (#8B5A2B) for body. Avoid pure black.
usage_rules.cta: The 'Buy Now' button MUST be Scientist Blue (#3B8DC4). This is a hard constraint.
usage_rules.accents: Use Golden Yellow (#E8B833) for decorative blobs/shapes behind images.

layout_and_grid.grid_strategy: Use the 'Bento Grid' for the Dedication section and Book Preview. Use 'Asymmetrical Split' for Hero and Author.
layout_and_grid.z_index_strategy: Layering is key. Background Texture (z-0) > Decorative Blobs (z-10) > Content (z-20) > Floating Elements (z-30) > Nav/Modal (z-50)

buttons.primary: bg-arky-blue DEFAULT hover:bg-arky-blue-light text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-bold text-lg shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-arky-brown-light text-arky-brown DEFAULT hover:bg-arky-brown-light hover:text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-bold transition-all duration-300

cards.style: bg-white rounded-3xl shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] border border-[#EBE5DA] p-8 hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.08)] transition-shadow duration-300

forms.input: bg-[#F7F4EF] border-0 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-arky-brown focus:ring-2 focus:ring-arky-blue/50 placeholder:text-arky-brown/40

navigation.style: Floating glassmorphism header. bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-white/20 rounded-full mt-4 mx-4 md:mx-auto max-w-4xl shadow-sm sticky top-4 z-50

images.alt: The Adventures of Arky Allogist Ant Book Cover

images.usage: Background for 'About the Book' or 'Community' section
Footer background or Dedication section background
Near the 'Buy Now' button (since the button matches his tie)

textures.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

open_graph_requirements.title: The Adventures of Arky Allogist Ant
open_graph_requirements.description: Join Arky on a faith-based adventure! A heartwarming tale for the whole family by Poopah (Moises Mendoza).

motion_guidelines.entrance: Staggered fade-up for all text elements. (duration-700)
motion_guidelines.scroll: Parallax effect on the Ant characters. They should move slightly slower/faster than scroll to create depth.
motion_guidelines.hover: Buttons should lift and glow. Images should have a subtle scale-up (zoom-in) effect.

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. OPEN GRAPH: You MUST add the meta tags in `/app/frontend/public/index.html`. This is a critical requirement.
3. NO FOOTER BRANDING: Do not add 'Made by Emergent' or any agency footer. Keep it clean.
4. DEDICATION: Create a special 'Crunch Bunch' grid layout for the grandchildren names: Maliyah, Natalia, Jonas, Draco, Silas, Jasper, Sarah, and Violet.
5. BUY FLOW: Ensure the 'Buy on Amazon' button is prominent in the Sticky Nav and Hero.
6. TEXTURE: Apply the noise texture to the `body` background to give it that tactile paper feel.
7. AUTHOR: Emphasize Moises Mendoza's background (Minister, Fresno, Agriculture) with the Preacher Scene image.

must_do: Use 'Outfit' for all UI text and 'Playfair Display' for all Headings.
Make the Blue CTA button pop against the Warm Bone background.
Ensure mobile responsiveness is perfect (images max-h-50vh on mobile).
